name: MikroTik Open Frame PSU 24V2APOW
title: MikroTik Open Frame PSU 24V2APOW
short_description: Compatible with CCR1009-8G-1S-1S+, Input: 100-240V AC 50/60Hz, Output: 24V DC 2.5A
description: The MikroTik 24V2APOW is a reliable open-frame power supply unit designed to ensure stable and efficient performance for compatible MikroTik devices. It delivers an output of 24 V and 2.5 A, providing a total power of 60 W, which makes it ideal for powering demanding network equipment. This model is compatible with MikroTik routers such as CCR1009-7G-1C-1S+ and CRS317-1G-16S+RM, offering dependable operation in both professional and industrial environments. The 24V2APOW is an embedded, case-less power supply designed to replace the main power module in case of a power failure, helping to minimize downtime and maintain uninterrupted network performance. Built for reliability, it ensures consistent voltage and protection against fluctuations, extending the lifespan of your devices. Compact and efficient, this power supply is a practical and cost-effective solution for maintaining stable performance in critical network systems that rely on continuous uptime.
